//: Ruflo / Claude Flow orchestration MCP servers for Towerpolis. Activate by opening Claude Code in this repo. claude-flow provides the swarm/memory/coordination tools the agents reference (mcp__claude-flow__*). Needs Node 20+. Run `npx claude-flow@v3alpha doctor` once to verify; set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in env if prompted. ruv-swarm is optional (extra swarm topology tools). flow-nexus (cloud sandboxes) is optional and needs a login — add it back only if you use Flow-Nexus.
